name: Credit Rent Boost - 950 Credit, Inc
description_short: Credit Rent Boost - 950 Credit, Inc is a credit repair provider based in Phoenix, Arizona. Rated 4.7/5 with 230 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Credit Rent Boost - 950 Credit, Inc is a credit repair provider serving clients in Phoenix, Arizona. With 230 Google reviews and a 4.7/5.0 rating, Credit Rent Boost - 950 Credit, Inc has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Credit Rent Boost - 950 Credit, Inc specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Phoenix, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Credit Rent Boost - 950 Credit, Inc operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Phoenix, Arizona area who are considering Credit Rent Boost - 950 Credit, Inc should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
